kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: If Kingsford does not go with Beatrix, then someone in the North Side goes with Blacksmith.
Either Southgate goes with 7 coins or someone in the Clothiers' Guild goes with Wulfric (but not both).
Everyone in the Joiners' Guild ranks higher in levy than everyone in the Clothiers' Guild.
Exactly one of Wulfric, the Blacksmith, the Fletcher, and the Tanner belongs to the Hill Ward.
Matilda's levy is lower than both the Tanner and the artisan in Millpond.
Either Aldric goes with 10 coins, or Wulfric goes with Riverside — but not both.
Between Bridgegate and Southgate, one goes with Edmund and the other with 10 coins.
At least one of Wulfric, the Blacksmith, and the Weaver belongs to the South Side.
Beatrix goes with exactly two of Blacksmith, Kingsford, and 8 coins.
7 coins, 9 coins, and 12 coins go with Matilda, Fletcher, and Millpond, in some order.
The Blacksmith's levy is higher than both Matilda and the artisan in Riverside.
12 coins goes with either Wulfric or Blacksmith (but not both).
Either Blacksmith goes with Millpond or someone in the Hill Ward goes with 9 coins (but not both).
More members of the Joiners' Guild are in the South Side than members of the Ironmongers' Guild.
At least one member of the Joiners' Guild is in the River Ward.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: If Cedarmere does not go with Cody, then someone in the Lowland Basin goes with Bass.
Either Willowmere goes with 4 lb or someone in the Sunfish Family goes with Wade (but not both).
Everyone in the Catfish Family ranks higher in weight than everyone in the Sunfish Family.
Exactly one of Wade, the angler who landed the Bass, the angler who landed the Carp, and the angler who landed the Perch belongs to the West Watershed.
Royce's weight is lower than both the angler who landed the Perch and the angler at Grayreach.
Either Boone goes with 7 lb, or Wade goes with Stillwater — but not both.
Between Birchpool and Willowmere, one goes with Dale and the other with 7 lb.
At least one of Wade, the angler who landed the Bass, and the angler who landed the Trout belongs to the East Watershed.
Cody goes with exactly two of Bass, Cedarmere, and 5 lb.
4 lb, 6 lb, and 9 lb go with Royce, Carp, and Grayreach, in some order.
The angler who landed the Bass' weight is higher than both Royce and the angler at Stillwater.
9 lb goes with either Wade or Bass (but not both).
Either Bass goes with Grayreach or someone in the West Watershed goes with 6 lb (but not both).
More members of the Catfish Family are in the East Watershed than members of the Pike Family.
At least one member of the Catfish Family is in the North Watershed.
